name: Database Reactivation Workflow (2)
description:
Build an automated Python-based Database Reactivation Workflow that:
1. Identifies dormant customers from a Google Sheets database
2. Generates personalized AI-driven messages via Anthropic Claude API based on customer history, churn score, and business type
3. Sends reactivation offers via email (Resend or Gmail API)
4. Logs all actions to a SYSTEM_LOG Google Sheet
5. Runs on a daily schedule (Python schedule library or cron)
6. Supports two modes: Demo mode (sample data, prints to console/file) and Production mode (real Google Sheets, real emails)
7. Serves as both a sellable product for SMBs (gyms, dental clinics, coaching businesses with 4,000+ inactive leads) and a demo to prove the concept

Target business types: gyms, dental clinics, coaching businesses.
Tech stack: Python, Google Sheets API, Anthropic Claude API, Resend/Gmail API, schedule/cron, GitHub Codespaces.

Research requested before building:
1. Similar Python-based customer reactivation workflows
2. Best practices for AI-generated personalized reactivation emails
3. Churn scoring thresholds (are 0.7/0.8/0.9 cutoffs standard?)
4. Email deliverability best practices in Python (Resend vs Gmail API vs SMTP)
5. Existing open-source reactivation workflow projects

After research, return with 20-30 clarification questions covering demo mode output format, client delivery method, language, error handling, duplicates, client setup requirements, pricing/packaging, compliance/spam laws.
